title: Record Dependabot stevedore update

sources.reason: Dependabot updates the stevedore development dependency pin.
Generated development dependency requirements reflect the Dependabot update.

riskAssessment.reason: Automated development dependency version update with no production behavior change.

executionDecision.reason: The dependency scope is explicit and CI verifies compatibility.

preReviewWarnings: Replace with task-specific review focus, or clear when no special review focus remains.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: The dependency update is recorded with an archived Contract and Summary.
The repository quality and supply-chain checks pass with the updated dependency metadata.
The PR remains limited to dependency metadata and governance evidence.
guidelines: New public APIs must be documented.
Do not import internal modules from other features.

intent.problem: The Dependabot PR updates stevedore from 5.8.0 to 5.9.0 and requires an auditable Work Item record for repository PR governance.
constraints: Keep the change limited to development dependency metadata and governance evidence.
Do not weaken any quality or supply-chain gates.
intent.rationale: A small archived Work Item makes automated dependency maintenance visible to the same PR governance chain as human-authored changes.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: Set only when a human explicitly approves restricted governance paths.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
